definitions.vi: Thời gian giữa lúc mặt trời lặn và mặt trời mọc khi trời tối.
definitions.es: El período de tiempo entre el atardecer y el amanecer cuando está oscuro afuera.
definitions.en: The period of time between sunset and sunrise when it is dark outside.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He usually goes for a walk with friends in the evening after work.
I will finish my homework before the evening.
She likes to have dinner with her family every evening.

translation.en: We will meet in the evening.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau vào ___.

notes_md:
**tối** usually means **evening**. It can also mean **dark** (no light).

As a time noun, it often appears as **buổi tối** (the evening). You’ll also see it in fixed time phrases.  

As an adjective, it describes lack of light: **trời tối** (the sky is dark), **phòng tối** (a dark room).

Don’t confuse it with **đêm** (night, later and deeper than evening). Opposite idea: **sáng** (bright / morning).
notes:
tối usually means evening. It can also mean dark (no light).

As a time noun, it often appears as buổi tối (the evening). You’ll also see it in fixed time phrases.  

As an adjective, it describes lack of light: trời tối (the sky is dark), phòng tối (a dark room).

Don’t confuse it with đêm (night, later and deeper than evening). Opposite idea: sáng (bright / morning).

translation.en: I will go out this evening.

exampleSentences: Anh thường đi dạo cùng bạn bè vào buổi tối sau giờ làm.
Em sẽ làm bài tập xong trước khi trời tối.
Chị thích ăn tối với gia đình vào mỗi buổi tối.
